title: feat(workspaces): add @mastra/agentfs workspace filesystem provider
summary: Adds a new @mastra/agentfs workspace filesystem provider that stores files in a Turso/SQLite database via agentfs-sdk. Implements the full WorkspaceFilesystem interface (read, write, append, delete, copy, move, mkdir, rmdir, readdir, exists, stat) with read-only mode enforcement and error mapping. Includes unit tests, integration tests, documentation (provider reference + sidebar entry), a changeset, and an example project. 29 files changed across workspaces/agentfs/, docs/, examples/agentfs-workspace/, and root config. Author notes it was mostly generated with Claude Code with manual touch-ups.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured community contribution adding a new workspace filesystem provider. Has merge conflicts that need resolving. CI checks are stuck in PENDING state (Core, E2E, MCP, Memory, RAG tests never ran — likely blocked by the merge conflicts or Vercel authorization). Vercel deploy checks fail because the external contributor needs authorization. CodeRabbit reviewed and flagged some issues (error swallowing in catch blocks, @types/node pinning); author addressed most feedback in follow-up commits. No human maintainer has reviewed yet. The pnpm-lock.yaml for the example project adds significant bulk. Author interacted with NikAiyer who apparently helped fix some issues. Needs: (1) resolve merge conflicts, (2) get a maintainer review of the implementation and the agentfs-sdk dependency.
